title: The Final Examination
description: Use all the evidence to deduce the mixing results.

hints.text: To find the result of mixing ing2 and ing4, apply the mixing rule: scan colours R→G→B in order. The first colour where both ingredients share the same sign determines the result potion. If all three colours have opposing signs, the result is neutral.

Step through each colour:
  R: ing2=R- (ing2+ing3=R-: both share R-), ing4=R- (ing3+ing4=R-: both share R-)
      → SAME sign - → R- resolves.

To find the result of mixing ing1 and ing2, apply the mixing rule: scan colours R→G→B in order. The first colour where both ingredients share the same sign determines the result potion. If all three colours have opposing signs, the result is neutral.

Step through each colour:
  R: ing1=R- (ing1 has R-), ing2=R- (ing2+ing3=R-: both share R-)
      → SAME sign - → R- resolves.

To find the result of mixing ing1 and ing4, apply the mixing rule: scan colours R→G→B in order. The first colour where both ingredients share the same sign determines the result potion. If all three colours have opposing signs, the result is neutral.

Step through each colour:
  R: ing1=R- (ing1 has R-), ing4=R- (ing3+ing4=R-: both share R-)
      → SAME sign - → R- resolves.
